title: Six killed including police constable as SUV rams parked lorry near Kurukkathi
summary: A speeding SUV crashed into a parked lorry near the Kurukkathi check post on the Tiruchi-Coimbatore NH in Tiruppur district, killing six including a police constable who was repositioning a barricade.

title: CM Vijay announces ₹30 lakh for constable's family, ₹3 lakh each for other victims
summary: Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay has announced ₹30 lakh for the family of the police constable and ₹3 lakh each for the other Tiruppur accident victims. DIG P. Saminathan inspected the spot.

title: Heavy rain and hail bring relief to Tiruppur city
summary: Heavy rain accompanied by hail, thunder and lightning lashed Tiruppur for over 30 minutes, with central bus stand, Palladam Road, Velliangadu and Rayapuram areas reporting waterlogging.

title: District Collector chairs water supply review meeting in Tiruppur
summary: The Tiruppur District Collector chaired a water supply review meeting on May 14, with officials briefing on the summer drinking water plan, tanker deployment and Bhavani feeder readiness.

title: Private school buses inspection conducted across Tiruppur district
summary: RTO and police teams jointly inspected private school buses across Tiruppur district, checking fitness, speed governors and driver credentials ahead of the new academic session.

title: Tiruppur police open fire at Palladam murder accused trying to escape custody
summary: Tiruppur district police opened fire at a Palladam murder case accused who attempted to escape custody during a recovery operation. The accused has been hospitalised under guard.

title: Tiruppur garment exporters await new government policy on textile sector
summary: Tiruppur garment exporters are awaiting the new government's textile sector policy and have urged measures on power tariffs, ETP costs and labour reforms to keep the EU and US order book intact.
